top_signals.title: Labour warned not to kill off hybrid jobs millions rely on
top_signals.summary: Labour has been warned not to “regulate flexible jobs out of existence” after new polling found two-thirds of part-time workers chose their role specifically because it offered flexibility around childcare or studying. The intervention from the British Retail Consortium (BRC) comes as ministers press ahead with plans to overhaul zero-hours contracts and force employers to [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ‘Please stop the FUD’: Zcash treasury company Cypherpunk remains committed to accumulating 5% of ZEC supply
top_signals.summary: Shares of Cypherpunk Technologies plunged more than 40% following the disclosure of a critical bug that was recently patched in Zcash.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin most oversold since 2020 crash: Can BTC rebound to $70K next?
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin’s latest oversold RSI mirrors 2020 and February 2026 setups that preceded 50% and 30% rebounds, putting $70K back in focus.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Bluesky was launched as a Twitter rival — but it's far less popular. Now it's eyeing Reddit for inspiration
top_signals.summary: "I think the public square is not the direction we want to go in...we're very inspired by companies like Reddit," Bluesky's Rose Wang told CNBC.

top_signals.title: In Matsuyama, sushi more than worth the pilgrimage
top_signals.summary: When chef Koji Takahira took over Kurumasushi from his father, he also transitioned to serving Edomae-style "nigiri" sushi — a move that has paid dividends.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
